introduced_concepts.name: Formula A4.64 Rate
introduced_concepts.definition: A parameter describing how quickly a process occurs.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 描述某个过程发生快慢的参数。

introduced_concepts.name: Eigenvalue
introduced_concepts.definition: A scalar value associated with a matrix transformation or correlation structure.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 矩阵变换或相关结构中的特征值。

introduced_concepts.name: Information
introduced_concepts.definition: A quantity measuring how much data or a likelihood constrains a parameter.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量数据或似然函数对参数约束程度的量。

introduced_concepts.name: Likelihood
introduced_concepts.definition: A measure of how well a model explains observed data.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量模型解释观测数据程度的量。

introduced_concepts.name: Population Size
introduced_concepts.definition: The number of individuals or gene copies represented by the population model.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 模型中表示的个体数或基因拷贝数。

introduced_concepts.name: Optimal Trait Value
introduced_concepts.definition: The trait value at which the fitness function reaches its optimum.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 使适合度函数达到最大值的性状取值。

introduced_concepts.name: Within-Block Environmental Variance
introduced_concepts.definition: The residual environmental variance within blocks after stratification.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 分层后区组内部剩余的环境方差。

introduced_concepts.name: Variance
introduced_concepts.definition: A measure of spread around the mean.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量一个量围绕平均值分散程度的指标。

introduced_concepts.name: Stationary Distribution
introduced_concepts.definition: A distribution that remains unchanged under the transition dynamics.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 在转移动力学下保持不变的概率分布。

introduced_concepts.name: Standard Deviation
introduced_concepts.definition: A square-root scale measure of spread around the mean.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 方差的平方根，用来表示分散程度的尺度。

introduced_concepts.name: Time
introduced_concepts.definition: A quantity indexing the stage, generation, or interval of the process.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 表示过程所处阶段、世代或时间间隔的量。

introduced_concepts.name: Fitness
introduced_concepts.definition: A measure of reproductive success or contribution to the next generation.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量个体繁殖成功或对下一代贡献的量。

introduced_concepts.name: E
introduced_concepts.definition: E names the biological object or model condition being used in this formula.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: E 表示本式讨论的生物学对象或模型条件，读公式时先确认它对应哪一类群体、性状或过程。
